summary: Full e2e testing of Sahaaya Instagram-style pivot. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests passed (auth, feed, posts, likes, comments, groups create/join/leave/post, friends request/accept/reject/list, discover, stories, memories, chat/Gemini, unauth). Frontend: all critical flows verified via Playwright — login → feed greeting 'Hello, Kamala Rao!' → 5 seeded Sahaaya Daily system posts → my-story-btn present → open-create-post modal → publish post appears at top → like toggle 0↔1 → comments flow (open → comment-form → input → submit → visible) → Groups page shows 9 groups (7 seeded + created), create-group-form toggles via toggle-create-group, group creation succeeds, open-group navigates to detail, joined groups show group-open-create-post composer → create-post-group-select appears in feed modal after joining a group, group-tagged post shows the group name badge (e.g. 'Gardening Circle') → Family tabs (friends/requests/discover) all present, discover shows Ramesh/Lakshmi/Harbhajan, Kamala→Lakshmi friend request → login as Lakshmi → Requests tab shows Kamala with accept button → Accept → both users appear in each other's friends list → language toggle EN/HI/KN switches labels (Hello/नमस्ते/ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ) → AI Companion returns real Gemini reply ('Namaste! It is so wonderful...') → mobile viewport shows bottom-nav (bnav-home/groups/family) → SOS/Mood/Care are absent (no data-testid='sos-*'; routes /care and /mood are not registered) → logout returns to /login → unauth /groups redirects to /login. No blocker issues found.

issues: Navigating to legacy removed routes /care or /mood shows a completely blank page (no route matched, no NotFound / no redirect to '/'). Consider adding a catch-all Route path='*' → Navigate to '/' for better UX. Not a functional bug since routes are truly removed as required.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Add a catch-all Route in App.js to redirect unknown paths (e.g., /care, /mood, /sos) to '/' so legacy links don't render a blank screen.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py contains all routes in one 600-line file — could be split by domain (auth/friends/groups/posts/stories/chat) as it grows, but acceptable at current size.
Frontend PostCard/StoriesBar/CreatePost not deeply inspected for a11y but no console errors observed.
get_current_user relies on Bearer token in header — correctly returns 401 on missing/invalid token (verified).
Mongo _id is consistently excluded via projection {"_id": 0} — good.
Async/await usage in backend looks correct; no sync blocking calls in request path.
user_public helper de-duplicates enrichment logic — good DRY practice.
Chat endpoint gracefully handles LLM errors with try/except fallback message — good defensive coding.
test_credentials: Seeded demo accounts (all password: demo1234): kamala@demo.com, ramesh@demo.com, lakshmi@demo.com, harbhajan@demo.com. Note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references old demo@sahaaya.com/pass123 which does not exist in current seed; consider updating that file.
seed_data_creation: Created a few UI-TEST groups, posts, comments, a story, a memory, and completed a friend request (Kamala↔Lakshmi). These are prefixed with UI-TEST/TEST_ for cleanup. No destructive changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Instagram-style pivot features verified working end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints. Note that Kamala↔Lakshmi are now friends and share some UI-TEST group memberships in the DB from this testing run; if tests need a clean state, either wipe test_database or reset friend arrays. /app/memory/test_credentials.md references outdated credentials — actual seeded demo accounts are the four @demo.com users with password demo1234.
